No setup fees, monthly fees, or hidden fees. Get started   Sign up with Google 2.9% + 30¢ per successful transaction for domestic cards Custom Design a custom package— available for businesses with large payments volume or unique business models. Contact sales   Sign up with Google IC+ pricing Volume discounts Multi-product discounts Country-specific rates Standard pricing Custom pricing FAQs Features available out of the box: Global access 195 countries Accept payments around the world with cardholder support in 195+ countries. 135+ currencies Process charges and display prices in your customer’s preferred currency to increase conversion. 100+ payment methods From Alipay to iDEAL, seamlessly support popular payment methods. 1 integration Accept payments globally through a single integration. Built-in fraud prevention Powerful machine learning Detect and block fraud using machine learning trained on data across millions of companies. Adapts to new fraud patterns Adapt faster to the latest trends with Radar’s machine learning. No integration required Get started with zero code thanks to Stripe’s built-in fraud protection. Fraud analytics Monitor your fraud performance with advanced analytics and alerting. Tools to optimize your checkout Flexible UI components Use UI building blocks to design a secure payments experience that perfectly matches your site. Pre-built payment forms Embed a prebuilt payments form into your website or direct customers to a Stripe-hosted page. Accelerated checkout Autofill your customers’ saved cards to deliver a frictionless checkout experience. No-code payments Accept payments in minutes by generating no-code links. Payments optimizations to boost revenue Real-time retries Increase revenue with selective retries powered by machine learning. Auto-updated cards Update card information in real-time, improving customer experience and increasing revenue.
